steps.text: Review the contract-draft skill reference to extract the specific checklist and structure for drafting a mutual NDA, including required sections and attorney-review disclaimer requirements.

Outline the NDA structure tailored to a mutual confidentiality agreement between Acme Corp and Beta LLC for evaluating a potential partnership, governed by Washington law, marking all unknowns as [BLANK].
Draft the full mutual NDA text following the outline, ensuring all unknown fields are marked [BLANK] and the governing law is Washington.
Review and harden the draft against the contract-draft checklist (clarity, defined terms, mutuality, IP, term/termination, remedies, boilerplate, and attorney-review disclaimer).
Prepare the final NDA draft in clean markdown form, ready for attorney review, with all placeholders clearly bracketed and the disclaimer included.
